author: @ChinaExplorerTour
text:
✨ Hey everyone! Thanks for watching! ✨
Ever thought about doing your own Hanfu photoshoot in China? Let me know which part of this video was your favorite—or if you have any questions about this experience!

author: @Zzr-s9o
text: The Manchu rulers of the Qing Dynasty forced the Han people to change their clothing, so now it is widely believed in China that the Han clothing of the Qing Dynasty does not belong to true Hanfu. You can choose Hanfu from the Ming Dynasty
